        aA: "z ∈ A(n)" and fa_eq: "f(n)`z = ?diff" by (auto simp only:)
      have a_cyc: "z ∈ ab.src.Cycles(n)"
      proof -
        have pn: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
          using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
        have fn_nm1_fun: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭) : A(n \<rs> 𝟭) → B(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using ses_map_f pn unfolding IsAchainMap_def Homomor_def by auto
        have fn_nm1_inj: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭) ∈ inj(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), B(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using ses_f_inj[OF pn] .
        have dAn_fun: "dA(n) : A(n) → A(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using ses_cplx_A n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def Homomor_def by auto       have dBn_fun: "dB(n) : B(n) → B(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using ses_cplx_B n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def Homomor_def by auto
        have grpBpn: "IsAgroup(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using ses_cplx_B pn unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
        have hg_dB: "group_homo(B(n), PB(n), B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭), dB(n))"
        proof -
          have hom: "Homomor(dB(n), B(n), PB(n), B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
            using ses_cplx_B n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
          from hom grpBn grpBpn show ?thesis unfolding group_homo_def by simp
        qed
        have dBn_b: "dB(n)`b = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using b dBn_fun by (simp add: func1_1_L15)
        have dBn_bspec: "dB(n)`?b_spec = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using b_spec_cyc dBn_fun by (simp add: func1_1_L15)
        have zero_Bpn: "TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)) ∈ B(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using group0.group0_2_L2_1[of "B(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)"] grpBpn
          unfolding group0_def by simp
        have f_dA: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(dA(n)`z) = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
        proof -
          have step1: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(dA(n)`z) = dB(n)`?diff"
          proof -
            have e1: "(f(n \<rs> 𝟭) O dA(n))`z = (dB(n) O f(n))`z"
              using ab.cmap_comm[OF n] by simp
            have e2: "(f(n \<rs> 𝟭) O dA(n))`z = f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(dA(n)`z)"
              using comp_fun_apply[OF dAn_fun aA] by simp
            have e3: "(dB(n) O f(n))`z = dB(n)`?diff"
              using comp_fun_apply[OF fn_fun aA] fa_eq by (simp only:)
            from e1 e2 e3 show ?thesis by (simp only:)
          qed
          have step2: "dB(n)`?diff =
                       PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)`⟨dB(n)`b, dB(n)`(GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec)⟩"
            using group_homo.f_hom[OF hg_dB bB inv_bs_B] by (simp only:)
          have step3: "dB(n)`(GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec) =
                       GroupInv(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))`(dB(n)`?b_spec)"
            using group_homo.f_inv[OF hg_dB b_spec_B] by (simp only:)
          have step4:
            "GroupInv(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))`(TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))) =
             TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
            using group0.group_inv_of_one[of "B(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)"] grpBpn
            unfolding group0_def by auto
          have step5:
            "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)`⟨TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)),
                        TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))⟩ =
             TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭),PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
            using group0.group0_2_L2[of "B(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)"] zero_Bpn grpBpn
            unfolding group0_def by simp
          from step1 step2 step3 dBn_b dBn_bspec step4 step5 show ?thesis by (simp only:)
        qed
        have dAn_a: "dA(n)`z ∈ A(n \<rs> 𝟭)" using apply_type[OF dAn_fun aA] .
        have neu_A: "TheNeutralElement(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), PA(n \<rs> 𝟭)) ∈ A(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using group_homo.origin group0.group0_2_L2 ses_hf[OF pn]
          unfolding group0_def by simp
        have f_neu: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(TheNeutralElement(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), PA(n \<rs> 𝟭))) =
                     TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using group_homo.f_neutral[OF ses_hf[OF pn]] by simp
        have dA_zero: "dA(n)`z = TheNeutralElement(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), PA(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using fn_nm1_inj dAn_a neu_A f_dA f_neu unfolding inj_def by auto
        from dA_zero aA dAn_fun show ?thesis by (simp add: func1_1_L15)
      qed
      have fnz_cyc: "f(n)`z ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n)"
        using ab.cmap_maps_cycles[OF n a_cyc] .
      have inv_b_eq:
        "∀h ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n).
           GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`h = GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`h"
        using BnGrp.group0_3_T2[OF ab.tgt.cycles_is_subgroup[OF n]] by blast
      have inv_b_cyc: "GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n)"
        using group0.inverse_in_group[OF _ b, of "ab.tgt.CycleOp(n)"]
              ab.tgt.cycles_is_group[OF n] unfolding group0_def by auto
      have inv_bspec_bnd: "GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec ∈ ab.tgt.Boundaries(n)"
      proof -
        have inv_bspec_cyc:
          "GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`?b_spec ∈ ab.tgt.Boundaries(n)"
          using BnCyc.group0_3_T3A[OF ab.tgt.boundaries_subgroup_cycles[OF n]] b_spec_bnd by auto
        from inv_b_eq b_spec_cyc have "GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), restrict(PB(n),
           ab.tgt.Cycles(n) × ab.tgt.Cycles(n))) ` (dB(n \<ra> 𝟭) ` b') = 
            \<rm>⇧B⇘n⇙ (dB(n \<ra> 𝟭) ` b')"
          by blast
          with inv_bspec_cyc show ?thesis by (simp only:)
      qed
      have fa_inv_b:
        "PB(n)`⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b⟩ = GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec"
      proof -
        have inv_b: "GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b ∈ B(n)"
          using BnGrp.inverse_in_group[OF bB] .
        have e1: "PB(n)`⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b⟩
                = PB(n)`⟨PB(n)`⟨b, GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b⟩,
                          GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec⟩"
          using fa_eq BnGrp.group0_4_L4A(5)[OF comBn bB b_spec_B bB] by (simp only:)
        have e2: "PB(n)`⟨b, GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b⟩ = TheNeutralElement(B(n),PB(n))"
          using BnGrp.group0_2_L6[OF bB] by blast
        have e3: "PB(n)`⟨TheNeutralElement(B(n),PB(n)), GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec⟩ =
                  GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`?b_spec"
          using BnGrp.group0_2_L2 inv_bs_B by (simp only:)
        from e1 e2 e3 show ?thesis by (simp only:)
      qed
      have rel_fab: "⟨f(n)`z, b⟩ ∈ ?Rb"
      proof -
        have inv_b_eq_b:
          "GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b = GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b"
          using inv_b_eq b by (simp only:)
        have pair_in: "⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b⟩
                     ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n) × ab.tgt.Cycles(n)"
          using fnz_cyc inv_b_cyc by auto
        from restrict[of "PB(n)" "ab.tgt.Cycles(n) × ab.tgt.Cycles(n)"
                         "⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b⟩"]
             pair_in inv_b_eq_b
        have cycop_eq:
          "ab.tgt.CycleOp(n)`⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b⟩
         = PB(n)`⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(B(n),PB(n))`b⟩"
          by (simp only: if_true)
        from cycop_eq fa_inv_b inv_bspec_bnd
        have in_bnd:
          "ab.tgt.CycleOp(n)`⟨f(n)`z, GroupInv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n))`b⟩
         ∈ ab.tgt.Boundaries(n)"
          by (simp only:)
        show ?thesis unfolding QuotientGroupRel_def using fnz_cyc b in_bnd by auto
      qed
      have cls_eq: "?Rb``{f(n)`z} = ?Rb``{b}"
        using equiv_b b rel_fab by (auto simp: equiv_class_eq)
      have Y_Hn: "?Ra``{z} ∈ ab.src.Hn(n)"
        using a_cyc equiv_a unfolding ab.src.Hn_def quotient_def by auto
      have pair_a: "⟨?Ra``{z}, ?Rb``{f(n)`z}⟩ ∈ ab.Hn_map(n)"
        unfolding ab.Hn_map_def using a_cyc by auto
      have map_Y: "ab.Hn_map(n)`(?Ra``{z}) = ?Rb``{f(n)`z}"
        using apply_equality[OF pair_a ab_map_fun] .
      from Y_Hn have "ab.Hn_map(n)`(?Ra``{z}) ∈ ab.Hn_map(n)``ab.src.Hn(n)"
        using func_imagedef[OF ab_map_fun subset_refl] by auto
      with map_Y have "?Rb``{f(n)`z} ∈ ab.Hn_map(n)``ab.src.Hn(n)"
        by auto 
      then show "X ∈ ab.Hn_map(n)``ab.src.Hn(n)"
        using X_eq cls_eq by auto
    qed
  qed
qed

text‹Exactness at $H_n(C)$: the image of $g_*$ equals the kernel of $\delta_n$.›

theorem (in ses_chain_complex) les_exact_at_HnC:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
  shows "IsExactAt(bc.Hn_map(n), ab.tgt.Hn(n), delta(n),
                   ab.src.Hn(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
proof -
  have pn: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  let ?Rb = "QuotientGroupRel(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ab.tgt.CycleOp(n), ab.tgt.Boundaries(n))"
  let ?Rc = "QuotientGroupRel(bc.tgt.Cycles(n), bc.tgt.CycleOp(n), bc.tgt.Boundaries(n))"
  let ?Ra = "QuotientGroupRel(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.Boundaries(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
  let ?neu_HnA = "TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Hn(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
  let ?Lft = "{x ∈ B(n). g(n)`x ∈ bc.tgt.Cycles(n)}"
  have arith_pm: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
    using Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] n by simp
  have bc_map_fun: "bc.Hn_map(n) : ab.tgt.Hn(n) → bc.tgt.Hn(n)"
    using bc.Hn_map_is_hom[OF n] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
  have delta_fun: "delta(n) : bc.tgt.Hn(n) → ab.src.Hn(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using delta_fun[OF n] .
  have gn_fun: "g(n) : B(n) → C(n)"
    using ses_map_g n unfolding IsAchainMap_def Homomor_def by auto
  have fn_fun: "f(n) : A(n) → B(n)"
    using ses_map_f n unfolding IsAchainMap_def Homomor_def by auto
  have fn_nm1_fun: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭) : A(n \<rs> 𝟭) → B(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using ses_map_f pn unfolding IsAchainMap_def Homomor_def by auto
  have fn_nm1_inj: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭) ∈ inj(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), B(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using ses_f_inj[OF pn] .
  have dBn_fun: "dB(n) : B(n) → B(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using ses_cplx_B n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def Homomor_def by auto
  have dAn_fun: "dA(n) : A(n) → A(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using ses_cplx_A n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def Homomor_def by auto
  have equiv_b: "equiv(ab.tgt.Cycles(n), ?Rb)"
    using ab.tgt.cycles_is_subgroup[OF n]
          group0.Group_ZF_2_4_L3[OF _ ab.tgt.boundaries_subgroup_cycles[OF n]]
    unfolding IsAsubgroup_def group0_def by auto
  have equiv_c: "equiv(bc.tgt.Cycles(n), ?Rc)"
    using bc.tgt.cycles_is_subgroup[OF n]
          group0.Group_ZF_2_4_L3[OF _ bc.tgt.boundaries_subgroup_cycles[OF n]]
    unfolding IsAsubgroup_def group0_def by auto
  have normal_a: "IsAnormalSubgroup(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.Boundaries(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using Group_ZF_2_4_L6(1)[OF ab.src.cycles_is_group[OF pn]
                               ab.src.cycles_is_abelian[OF pn]
                               ab.src.boundaries_subgroup_cycles[OF pn]] by simp
  have gnB_C: "g(n)``B(n) = C(n)"
  proof -
    have ea_C: "IsExactAt(g(n), B(n), ZeroMap(C(n), 1, TrivOp), 1, TrivOp)"
      using deg_ses[OF n] unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def by auto
    have grpC: "IsAgroup(C(n), PC(n))"
      using deg_ses[OF n] unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto
    from ea_C show ?thesis
      using ZeroMap_preimage_full[OF grpC trivial_group] TrivOp_ne unfolding IsExactAt_def by simp
  qed
  have hgn: "group_homo(B(n), PB(n), C(n), PC(n), g(n))" using ses_hg[OF n] .
  have grpBn: "IsAgroup(B(n), PB(n))"
    using ses_cplx_B n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
  have grpBpn: "IsAgroup(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using ses_cplx_B pn unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
  have hg_dB: "group_homo(B(n), PB(n), B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭), dB(n))"
  proof -
    have hom: "Homomor(dB(n), B(n), PB(n), B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
      using ses_cplx_B n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
    from hom grpBn grpBpn show ?thesis unfolding group_homo_def by simp
  qed
  interpret AnCyc: group0 "ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    "TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
    "λx y. ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭))`x"
    "λs. Fold(ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭), TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)), s)"
    "λna x. Fold(ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭), TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)), {⟨k, x⟩. k ∈ na})"
    using ab.src.cycles_is_group[OF pn] unfolding group0_def by simp
  interpret BnGrp: group0 "B(n)" "PB(n)"
    "TheNeutralElement(B(n), PB(n))" "λx y. PB(n)`⟨x, y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`x"
    "λs. Fold(PB(n), TheNeutralElement(B(n), PB(n)), s)"
    "λna x. Fold(PB(n), TheNeutralElement(B(n), PB(n)), {⟨k, x⟩. k ∈ na})"
    using grpBn unfolding group0_def by simp
  have cls_zero_A: "?Ra``{ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭)} = ?neu_HnA"
  proof -
    have zero_A_cyc: "ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭) ∈ ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
      using group0.group0_3_L5[of "A(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PA(n \<rs> 𝟭)"] ab.src.cplx_group[OF pn]
            ab.src.cycles_is_subgroup[OF pn] unfolding group0_def by simp
    have zero_A_bnd: "ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭) ∈ ab.src.Boundaries(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
    proof -
      have neu_eq: "TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)) =
                    ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
        using group0.group0_3_L4[of "A(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PA(n \<rs> 𝟭)"]
              ab.src.cycles_is_subgroup[OF pn] ab.src.cplx_group[OF pn]
        unfolding group0_def by simp
      from AnCyc.group0_3_L5[OF ab.src.boundaries_subgroup_cycles[OF pn]] neu_eq
      show ?thesis by simp
    qed
    from AnCyc.Group_ZF_2_4_L5E[OF normal_a zero_A_cyc] zero_A_bnd
    have cls: "?Ra``{ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭)} = TheNeutralElement(
      ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭) // ?Ra,
      QuotientGroupOp(ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.CycleOp(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.Boundaries(n \<rs> 𝟭)))"
      by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding ab.src.Hn_def ab.src.HnOp_def using cls by simp
  qed
  show ?thesis unfolding IsExactAt_def
  proof (rule equalityI)
    show "bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n) ⊆ delta(n)-``{?neu_HnA}"
    proof
      fix X assume Xim: "X ∈ bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n)"
      from func_imagedef[OF bc_map_fun subset_refl] Xim obtain Y where
        Y_Hn: "Y ∈ ab.tgt.Hn(n)" and X_eq: "X = bc.Hn_map(n)`Y" by auto
      from Y_Hn obtain b where b: "b ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n)" and Y_eq: "Y = ?Rb``{b}"
        unfolding ab.tgt.Hn_def quotient_def by auto
      have bB: "b ∈ B(n)"
        using ab.tgt.cycles_is_subgroup[OF n] group0.group0_3_L2
              ab.tgt.cplx_group[OF n] b unfolding group0_def by blast
      have gnb_cyc: "g(n)`b ∈ bc.tgt.Cycles(n)"
        using bc.cmap_maps_cycles[OF n b] .
      have X_val: "X = ?Rc``{g(n)`b}"
      proof -
        have pair: "⟨?Rb``{b}, ?Rc``{g(n)`b}⟩ ∈ bc.Hn_map(n)"
          unfolding bc.Hn_map_def using b by auto
        from Y_eq show ?thesis using apply_equality[OF pair bc_map_fun] X_eq by simp
      qed
      have X_Hn: "X ∈ bc.tgt.Hn(n)"
        using X_val gnb_cyc equiv_c unfolding bc.tgt.Hn_def quotient_def by auto
      have dBb_zero: "dB(n)`b = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
        using b dBn_fun by (simp add: func1_1_L15)
      have cl_eq_zero: "conn_lift(n, b) = ab.src.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
      proof -
        have maps_to_zero: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(conn_lift(n, b)) = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using conn_lift_maps[OF n bB gnb_cyc] dBb_zero by simp
        have f_neu: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(TheNeutralElement(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), PA(n \<rs> 𝟭))) =
                     TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using group_homo.f_neutral[OF ses_hf[OF pn]] by simp
        have clb_A: "conn_lift(n, b) ∈ A(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using conn_lift_in_A[OF n bB gnb_cyc] .
        have neu_A: "TheNeutralElement(A(n \<rs> 𝟭), PA(n \<rs> 𝟭)) ∈ A(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
          using group_homo.origin group0.group0_2_L2 ses_hf[OF pn] unfolding group0_def by simp
        from fn_nm1_inj clb_A neu_A maps_to_zero f_neu
        show ?thesis unfolding inj_def by auto
      qed
      have delta_X: "delta(n)`X = ?Ra``{conn_lift(n, b)}"
      proof -
        have pair: "⟨?Rc``{g(n)`b}, ?Ra``{conn_lift(n, b)}⟩ ∈ delta(n)"
          unfolding delta_def using bB gnb_cyc by auto
        from X_val show ?thesis using apply_equality[OF pair delta_fun] by simp
      qed
      show "X ∈ delta(n)-``{?neu_HnA}"
        using func1_1_L15[OF delta_fun] X_Hn delta_X cl_eq_zero cls_zero_A by auto
    qed
    show "delta(n)-``{?neu_HnA} ⊆ bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n)"
    proof
      fix X assume Xker: "X ∈ delta(n)-``{?neu_HnA}"
      have X_Hn: "X ∈ bc.tgt.Hn(n)"
        using Xker func1_1_L15[OF delta_fun] by auto
      have X_delta_neu: "delta(n)`X = ?neu_HnA"
        using Xker func1_1_L15[OF delta_fun] by auto
      from X_Hn obtain c where c: "c ∈ bc.tgt.Cycles(n)" and X_eq: "X = ?Rc``{c}"
        unfolding bc.tgt.Hn_def quotient_def by auto
      have cC: "c ∈ C(n)"
        using bc.tgt.cycles_is_subgroup[OF n] group0.group0_3_L2 bc.tgt.cplx_group[OF n] c
        unfolding group0_def by blast
      from cC gnB_C have "c ∈ g(n)``B(n)" by auto
      then obtain b where bB: "b ∈ B(n)" and gnb: "g(n)`b = c"
        using func_imagedef[OF gn_fun subset_refl] by auto
      have b_cyc_C: "g(n)`b ∈ bc.tgt.Cycles(n)" using gnb c by simp
      have bLft: "b ∈ ?Lft" using bB b_cyc_C by auto
      have cl_cyc: "conn_lift(n, b) ∈ ab.src.Cycles(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
        using conn_lift_in_cycles[OF n bB b_cyc_C] .
      have delta_X_val: "delta(n)`X = ?Ra``{conn_lift(n, b)}"
      proof -
        have pair: "⟨?Rc``{g(n)`b}, ?Ra``{conn_lift(n, b)}⟩ ∈ delta(n)"
          unfolding delta_def using bLft by auto
        from X_eq gnb show ?thesis using apply_equality[OF pair delta_fun] by simp
      qed
      have cl_bnd: "conn_lift(n, b) ∈ ab.src.Boundaries(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
      proof -
        have cls_eq: "?Ra``{conn_lift(n, b)} = ?neu_HnA"
          using delta_X_val X_delta_neu by simp
        from AnCyc.Group_ZF_2_4_L5E[OF normal_a cl_cyc] cls_eq
        show ?thesis unfolding ab.src.Hn_def ab.src.HnOp_def by simp
      qed
      from cl_bnd arith_pm have cl_im: "conn_lift(n, b) ∈ (dA(n))``(A(n))" by simp
      from func_imagedef[OF dAn_fun subset_refl] cl_im obtain a0 where
        a0A: "a0 ∈ A(n)" and cl_eq: "conn_lift(n, b) = dA(n)`a0" by auto
      let ?b' = "PB(n)`⟨b, GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0)⟩"
      have fna0_B: "f(n)`a0 ∈ B(n)" using apply_type[OF fn_fun a0A] .
      have inv_fna0_B: "GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0) ∈ B(n)"
        using BnGrp.inverse_in_group[OF fna0_B] .
      have b'_B: "?b' ∈ B(n)" using BnGrp.group_op_closed bB inv_fna0_B .
      have g_b': "g(n)`?b' = c"
      proof -
        have e1: "g(n)`?b' =
                  PC(n)`⟨g(n)`b, g(n)`(GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0))⟩"
          using group_homo.f_hom[OF hgn bB inv_fna0_B] .
        have e2: "g(n)`(GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0)) =
                  GroupInv(C(n), PC(n))`(g(n)`(f(n)`a0))"
          using group_homo.f_inv[OF hgn fna0_B] .
        have e3: "g(n)`(f(n)`a0) = bc.tgt.zero_C(n)"
        proof -
          have fna0_im: "f(n)`a0 ∈ f(n)``A(n)"
            using func_imagedef[OF fn_fun subset_refl] a0A by auto
          from fna0_im ses_im_eq_ker[OF n]
          have fna0_ker: "f(n)`a0 ∈ g(n)-``{TheNeutralElement(C(n), PC(n))}" by simp
          from func1_1_L15[OF gn_fun] fna0_B fna0_ker show ?thesis by auto
        qed
        have grpC: "IsAgroup(C(n), PC(n))"
          using ses_cplx_C n unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
        have gnb_C: "g(n)`b ∈ C(n)" using apply_type[OF gn_fun bB] .
        have inv_zero: "GroupInv(C(n), PC(n))`(bc.tgt.zero_C(n)) = bc.tgt.zero_C(n)"
          using group0.group_inv_of_one[of "C(n)" "PC(n)"] grpC unfolding group0_def by auto
        from e1 e2 e3 inv_zero have
          "g(n)`?b' = PC(n)`⟨g(n)`b, bc.tgt.zero_C(n)⟩" by (auto simp only:)
        also have "… = g(n)`b"
          using group0.group0_2_L2[of "C(n)" "PC(n)"] gnb_C grpC unfolding group0_def by simp
        finally show ?thesis using gnb by blast
      qed
      have dBb': "dB(n)`?b' = TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
      proof -
        have e1: "dB(n)`?b' =
                  PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)`⟨dB(n)`b, dB(n)`(GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0))⟩"
          using group_homo.f_hom[OF hg_dB bB inv_fna0_B] .
        have e2: "dB(n)`(GroupInv(B(n), PB(n))`(f(n)`a0)) =
                  GroupInv(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))`(dB(n)`(f(n)`a0))"
          using group_homo.f_inv[OF hg_dB fna0_B] .
        have e3: "dB(n)`(f(n)`a0) = dB(n)`b"
        proof -
          have step: "(dB(n) O f(n))`a0 = (f(n \<rs> 𝟭) O dA(n))`a0"
            using ab.cmap_comm[OF n] by simp
          have lhs: "(dB(n) O f(n))`a0 = dB(n)`(f(n)`a0)"
            using comp_fun_apply[OF fn_fun a0A] by simp
          have rhs: "(f(n \<rs> 𝟭) O dA(n))`a0 = f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(dA(n)`a0)"
            using comp_fun_apply[OF dAn_fun a0A] by simp
          have e4: "f(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(dA(n)`a0) = dB(n)`b"
            using cl_eq conn_lift_maps[OF n bB b_cyc_C] by simp
          from step lhs rhs e4 show ?thesis by simp
        qed
        have dBb_Bpn: "dB(n)`b ∈ B(n \<rs> 𝟭)" using apply_type[OF dBn_fun bB] .
        have e5: "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)`⟨dB(n)`b, GroupInv(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))`(dB(n)`b)⟩ =
                  TheNeutralElement(B(n \<rs> 𝟭), PB(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
          using group0.group0_2_L6[of "B(n \<rs> 𝟭)" "PB(n \<rs> 𝟭)"] dBb_Bpn grpBpn
          unfolding group0_def by simp
        from e1 e2 e3 e5 show ?thesis by (auto simp only:)
      qed
      have b'_cyc: "?b' ∈ ab.tgt.Cycles(n)"
        using b'_B dBb' func1_1_L15[OF dBn_fun, of "{ab.tgt.zero_C(n \<rs> 𝟭)}"]
        by (auto simp only:)
      have pair: "⟨?Rb``{?b'}, ?Rc``{g(n)`?b'}⟩ ∈ bc.Hn_map(n)"
        unfolding bc.Hn_map_def using b'_cyc by (auto simp only:)
      have Y_Hn: "?Rb``{?b'} ∈ ab.tgt.Hn(n)"
        using b'_cyc equiv_b unfolding ab.tgt.Hn_def quotient_def by (auto simp only:)
      have bc_Y: "bc.Hn_map(n)`(?Rb``{?b'}) = ?Rc``{c}"
        using apply_equality[OF pair bc_map_fun] g_b' by (auto simp only:)
      from Y_Hn have "bc.Hn_map(n)`(?Rb``{?b'})∈{bc.Hn_map(n) ` x . x ∈ ab.tgt.Hn(n)}" by blast
      then have "bc.Hn_map(n)`(?Rb``{?b'})∈bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n)"
        using func_imagedef[OF bc_map_fun subset_refl] by (auto simp only:)
      with bc_Y have "?Rc``{c}∈bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n)" by (auto simp only:)
      then show "X ∈ bc.Hn_map(n)``ab.tgt.Hn(n)" using X_eq by simp
    qed
  qed
qed

text‹The long exact sequence in homology: for each degree $n \in \mathbb{Z}$, the sequence
  $\ldots \to H_n(A) \xrightarrow{f_*} H_n(B) \xrightarrow{g_*} H_n(C) \xrightarrow{\delta_n}
   H_{n-1}(A) \to \ldots$ is exact at every term.›

theorem (in ses_chain_complex) long_exact_sequence:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
  shows
    "IsExactAt(delta(n), bc.tgt.Hn(n), ab.Hn_map(n \<rs> 𝟭),
               ab.tgt.Hn(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.tgt.HnOp(n \<rs> 𝟭)) ∧
     IsExactAt(ab.Hn_map(n), ab.src.Hn(n), bc.Hn_map(n),
               bc.tgt.Hn(n), bc.tgt.HnOp(n)) ∧
     IsExactAt(bc.Hn_map(n), ab.tgt.Hn(n), delta(n),
               ab.src.Hn(n \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
  using les_exact_at_HnA[OF n] les_exact_at_HnB[OF n] les_exact_at_HnC[OF n]
  by auto

subsection ‹The long exact sequence as a chain complex›

text‹We encode the long exact sequence in homology as a single chain complex
  (the \emph{interleaved complex}), indexed by $\mathbb{Z}$ via the identification
  \[
    G(3k) = H_k(A),\quad G(3k-1) = H_k(B),\quad G(3k-2) = H_k(C),
  \]
  with boundary maps $d(3k) = f_{k,*}$, $d(3k-1) = g_{k,*}$,
  $d(3k-2) = \delta_k$.  The three cases are detected by $m \bmod 3$.›

definition (in ses_chain_complex) les_G :: "i ⇒ i" where
  "les_G(m) ≡
    if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬
    then ab.src.Hn(m zdiv 𝟯)
    else if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮
    then ab.tgt.Hn((m \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)
    else bc.tgt.Hn((m \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"

definition (in ses_chain_complex) les_opG :: "i ⇒ i" where
  "les_opG(m) ≡
    if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬
    then ab.src.HnOp(m zdiv 𝟯)
    else if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮
    then ab.tgt.HnOp((m \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)
    else bc.tgt.HnOp((m \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"

definition (in ses_chain_complex) les_d :: "i ⇒ i" where
  "les_d(m) ≡
    if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬
    then ab.Hn_map(m zdiv 𝟯)
    else if m zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮
    then bc.Hn_map((m \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)
    else delta((m \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"

text‹When $m \bmod 3 = 0$ the interleaved boundary satisfies $d_{m-1} \circ d_m = 0$:
  $d_m = f_{k,*}$ and $d_{m-1} = g_{k,*}$ (where $k = m \operatorname{div} 3$), and
  $g_{k,*} \circ f_{k,*} = 0$ by exactness at $H_k(B)$.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_dd_zero_mod0:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
    and nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    and X: "X ∈ les_G(n)"
  shows "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(les_d(n)`X) =
         TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))"
proof -
  let ?k = "n zdiv 𝟯"
  have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
  have nm1T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm2T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    using zmod_0_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
  have nm2_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    using zmod_2_minus_one[OF nm1T nm1_mod] .
  have arith1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
  have arith2: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n"
  proof -
    have s1: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = n \<rs> 𝟭"
      using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have s2: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
      using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have s3: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm2T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
    from s1 s2 s3 show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  have G_n: "les_G(n) = ab.src.Hn(?k)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nmod by simp
  have d_n: "les_d(n) = ab.Hn_map(?k)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nmod by simp
  have d_nm1: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.Hn_map(((n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nm1_mod two_neq_zero by simp
  have d_nm1_k: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.Hn_map(?k)"
    using d_nm1 arith1 by simp
  have G_nm2: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nm2_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two arith2 by simp
  have opG_nm2: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
    unfolding les_opG_def using nm2_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two arith2 by simp
  have X_Hn: "X ∈ ab.src.Hn(?k)" using X G_n by simp
  have ab_map_fun: "ab.Hn_map(?k) : ab.src.Hn(?k) → ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using ab.Hn_map_is_hom[OF kT] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
  have val_Hn: "ab.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈ ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using apply_type[OF ab_map_fun X_Hn] .
  have bc_map_fun: "bc.Hn_map(?k) : ab.tgt.Hn(?k) → bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using bc.Hn_map_is_hom[OF kT] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
  have exact_sub: "ab.Hn_map(?k)``ab.src.Hn(?k) ⊆
    bc.Hn_map(?k)-``{TheNeutralElement(bc.tgt.Hn(?k), bc.tgt.HnOp(?k))}"
    using les_exact_at_HnB[OF kT] unfolding IsExactAt_def by auto
  have X_im: "ab.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈ ab.Hn_map(?k)``ab.src.Hn(?k)"
    using func_imagedef[OF ab_map_fun subset_refl] X_Hn by auto
  have mem: "ab.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈ bc.Hn_map(?k)-``{TheNeutralElement(bc.tgt.Hn(?k), bc.tgt.HnOp(?k))}"
    using exact_sub X_im by auto
  have zero: "bc.Hn_map(?k)`(ab.Hn_map(?k)`X) = TheNeutralElement(bc.tgt.Hn(?k), bc.tgt.HnOp(?k))"
    using func1_1_L15[OF bc_map_fun] val_Hn mem by auto
  show ?thesis using d_n d_nm1_k zero G_nm2 opG_nm2 by simp
qed

text‹When $m \bmod 3 = 2$ the interleaved boundary satisfies $d_{m-1} \circ d_m = 0$:
  $d_m = g_{k,*}$ and $d_{m-1} = \delta_k$ (where $k = (m+1) \operatorname{div} 3$), and
  $\delta_k \circ g_{k,*} = 0$ by exactness at $H_k(C)$.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_dd_zero_mod2:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
    and nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    and X: "X ∈ les_G(n)"
  shows "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(les_d(n)`X) =
         TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))"
proof -
  let ?k = "(n \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯"
  have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
  have km1T: "?k \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using kT Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm1T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm2T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    using zmod_2_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
  have nm2_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    using zmod_1_minus_one[OF nm1T nm1_mod] .
  have arith1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
  have arith2: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n"
  proof -
    have s1: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = n \<rs> 𝟭"
      using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have s2: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
      using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have s3: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm2T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
    from s1 s2 s3 show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have arith_d: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮 = n \<ra> 𝟭"
  proof -
    have s: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
    from s arith1 show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have arith3: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟯 = n \<ra> 𝟭"
  proof -
    have s: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟯 = n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm2T int_two_three_are_int(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric]
      by simp
    from s arith2 show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have kdiv: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 = ?k \<rs> 𝟭"
  proof -
    have h: "?k = (n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using zdiv_add_three[OF nm2T] arith3 by simp
    have hT: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 ∈ ℤ" using zdiv_type by simp
    from h show ?thesis
      using hT Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)
            group0.inv_cancel_two(2)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
  qed
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  have G_n: "les_G(n) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nmod two_neq_zero by simp
  have d_n: "les_d(n) = bc.Hn_map(?k)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nmod two_neq_zero by simp
  have d_nm1: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = delta(((n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nm1_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
  have d_nm1_k: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = delta(?k)"
    using d_nm1 arith_d by simp
  have G_nm2: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nm2_mod kdiv by simp
  have opG_nm2: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    unfolding les_opG_def using nm2_mod kdiv by simp
  have X_Hn: "X ∈ ab.tgt.Hn(?k)" using X G_n by simp
  have bc_map_fun: "bc.Hn_map(?k) : ab.tgt.Hn(?k) → bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using bc.Hn_map_is_hom[OF kT] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
  have val_Hn: "bc.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈ bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using apply_type[OF bc_map_fun X_Hn] .
  have delta_fun: "delta(?k) : bc.tgt.Hn(?k) → ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using delta_fun[OF kT] .
  have exact_sub: "bc.Hn_map(?k)``ab.tgt.Hn(?k) ⊆
    delta(?k)-``{TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))}"
    using les_exact_at_HnC[OF kT] unfolding IsExactAt_def by auto
  have X_im: "bc.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈ bc.Hn_map(?k)``ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using func_imagedef[OF bc_map_fun subset_refl] X_Hn by auto
  have mem: "bc.Hn_map(?k)`X ∈
    delta(?k)-``{TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))}"
    using exact_sub X_im by auto
  have zero: "delta(?k)`(bc.Hn_map(?k)`X) =
              TheNeutralElement(ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.src.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using func1_1_L15[OF delta_fun] val_Hn mem by auto
  show ?thesis using d_n d_nm1_k zero G_nm2 opG_nm2 by simp
qed

text‹When $m \bmod 3 = 1$ the interleaved boundary satisfies $d_{m-1} \circ d_m = 0$:
  $d_m = \delta_k$ and $d_{m-1} = f_{k-1,*}$ (where $k = (m+2) \operatorname{div} 3$), and
  $f_{k-1,*} \circ \delta_k = 0$ by exactness at $H_{k-1}(A)$.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_dd_zero_mod1:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
    and nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    and X: "X ∈ les_G(n)"
  shows "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(les_d(n)`X) =
         TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))"
proof -
  let ?k = "(n \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯"
  have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
  have km1T: "?k \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using kT Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm1T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm2T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    using zmod_1_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
  have nm2_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    using zmod_0_minus_one[OF nm1T nm1_mod] .
  have arith_k: "n \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟯"
  proof -
    have h1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
      using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have h2: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟯"
      using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) int_two_three_are_int(1)]
            Int_ZF_1_1_L5(4)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) int_two_three_are_int(1)] by simp
    from h1 h2 show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have kdiv: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 = ?k \<rs> 𝟭"
  proof -
    have h: "?k = (n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 \<ra> 𝟭"
      using zdiv_add_three[OF nm1T] arith_k by simp
    have hT: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 ∈ ℤ" using zdiv_type by simp
    from h show ?thesis
      using hT Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)
            group0.inv_cancel_two(2)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
  qed
  have arith_nm2: "(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n \<rs> 𝟭"
    using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  have G_n: "les_G(n) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
  have d_n: "les_d(n) = delta(?k)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
  have d_nm1: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.Hn_map((n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)"
    unfolding les_d_def using nm1_mod by simp
  have d_nm1_k: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.Hn_map(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using d_nm1 kdiv by simp
  have G_nm2: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    unfolding les_G_def using nm2_mod two_neq_zero arith_nm2 kdiv by simp
  have opG_nm2: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    unfolding les_opG_def using nm2_mod two_neq_zero arith_nm2 kdiv by simp
  have X_Hn: "X ∈ bc.tgt.Hn(?k)" using X G_n by simp
  have delta_fun: "delta(?k) : bc.tgt.Hn(?k) → ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using delta_fun[OF kT] .
  have val_Hn: "delta(?k)`X ∈ ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using apply_type[OF delta_fun X_Hn] .
  have hn_map_fun: "ab.Hn_map(?k \<rs> 𝟭) : ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭) → ab.tgt.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
    using ab.Hn_map_is_hom[OF km1T] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
  have exact_sub: "delta(?k)``bc.tgt.Hn(?k) ⊆
    ab.Hn_map(?k \<rs> 𝟭)-``{TheNeutralElement(ab.tgt.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.tgt.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))}"
    using les_exact_at_HnA[OF kT] unfolding IsExactAt_def by auto
  have X_im: "delta(?k)`X ∈ delta(?k)``bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
    using func_imagedef[OF delta_fun subset_refl] X_Hn by auto
  have mem: "delta(?k)`X ∈
    ab.Hn_map(?k \<rs> 𝟭)-``{TheNeutralElement(ab.tgt.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.tgt.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))}"
    using exact_sub X_im by auto
  have zero: "ab.Hn_map(?k \<rs> 𝟭)`(delta(?k)`X) =
              TheNeutralElement(ab.tgt.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭), ab.tgt.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using func1_1_L15[OF hn_map_fun] val_Hn mem by auto
  show ?thesis using d_n d_nm1_k zero G_nm2 opG_nm2 by simp
qed

text‹The $n$-th group in the long exact sequence is a group.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_G_is_group:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
  shows "IsAgroup(les_G(n), les_opG(n))"
proof -
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  show ?thesis using zmod_three_cases[OF n]
  proof (elim disjE)
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    have kT: "(n zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using ab.src.Hn_is_group[OF kT] nmod by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    have kT: "((n \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using bc.tgt.Hn_is_group[OF kT] nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    have kT: "((n \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using ab.tgt.Hn_is_group[OF kT] nmod two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
  qed
qed

text‹The $n$-th group in the long exact sequence is abelian.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_G_is_abelian:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
  shows "les_opG(n) {is commutative on} les_G(n)"
proof -
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  show ?thesis using zmod_three_cases[OF n]
  proof (elim disjE)
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    have kT: "(n zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using ab.src.Hn_is_abelian[OF kT] nmod by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    have kT: "((n \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using bc.tgt.Hn_is_abelian[OF kT] nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    have kT: "((n \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯) ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    show ?thesis unfolding les_G_def les_opG_def
      using ab.tgt.Hn_is_abelian[OF kT] nmod two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
  qed
qed

text‹The $n$-th boundary map in the long exact sequence is a group homomorphism.›

lemma (in ses_chain_complex) les_d_is_hom:
  assumes n: "n ∈ ints"
  shows "Homomor(les_d(n), les_G(n), les_opG(n), les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
proof -
  have nm1T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
    using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
  have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
    using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
  have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
  have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
    using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
  show ?thesis using zmod_three_cases[OF n]
  proof (elim disjE)
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
    let ?k = "n zdiv 𝟯"
    have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮" using zmod_0_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
    have arith1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
      using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    have G_n: "les_G(n) = ab.src.Hn(?k)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nmod by simp
    have opG_n: "les_opG(n) = ab.src.HnOp(?k)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nmod by simp
    have d_n: "les_d(n) = ab.Hn_map(?k)"
      unfolding les_d_def using nmod by simp
    have G_nm1: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nm1_mod arith1 two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
    have opG_nm1: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nm1_mod arith1 two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
    show ?thesis using d_n G_n opG_n G_nm1 opG_nm1 ab.Hn_map_is_hom[OF kT] by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
    let ?k = "(n \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯"
    have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬" using zmod_1_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
    have arith_k: "n \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟯"
    proof -
      have h1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
        using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
      have h2: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟯"
        using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) int_two_three_are_int(1)]
              Int_ZF_1_1_L5(4)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) int_two_three_are_int(1)] by simp
      from h1 h2 show ?thesis by simp
    qed
    have kdiv: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 = ?k \<rs> 𝟭"
    proof -
      have h: "?k = (n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 \<ra> 𝟭"
        using zdiv_add_three[OF nm1T] arith_k by simp
      have hT: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯 ∈ ℤ" using zdiv_type by simp
      from h show ?thesis
        using hT Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)
              group0.inv_cancel_two(2)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
    qed
    have G_n: "les_G(n) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
    have opG_n: "les_opG(n) = bc.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
    have d_n: "les_d(n) = delta(?k)"
      unfolding les_d_def using nmod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
    have G_nm1: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.Hn(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nm1_mod kdiv by simp
    have opG_nm1: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.HnOp(?k \<rs> 𝟭)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nm1_mod kdiv by simp
    show ?thesis using d_n G_n opG_n G_nm1 opG_nm1 delta_is_hom[OF kT] by simp
  next
    assume nmod: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
    let ?k = "(n \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯"
    have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
    have nm1_mod: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭" using zmod_2_minus_one[OF n nmod] .
    have arith: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮 = n \<ra> 𝟭"
    proof -
      have s1: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n"
        using n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3)] by simp
      have s2: "(n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮 = (n \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
        using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
      from s1 s2 show ?thesis by simp
    qed
    have G_n: "les_G(n) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nmod two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
    have opG_n: "les_opG(n) = ab.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nmod two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
    have d_n: "les_d(n) = bc.Hn_map(?k)"
      unfolding les_d_def using nmod two_neq_zero one_neq_zero by simp
    have G_nm1: "les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
      unfolding les_G_def using nm1_mod arith one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
    have opG_nm1: "les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
      unfolding les_opG_def using nm1_mod arith one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
    show ?thesis using d_n G_n opG_n G_nm1 opG_nm1 bc.Hn_map_is_hom[OF kT] by simp
  qed
qed

text‹The interleaved long exact sequence data forms a chain complex.›

theorem (in ses_chain_complex) les_is_chain_complex:
  shows "IsAchainComplex(les_G, les_opG, les_d)"
proof -
  have part1: "∀n ∈ int.
      IsAgroup(les_G(n), les_opG(n)) ∧ les_opG(n) {is commutative on} les_G(n)"
    using les_G_is_group les_G_is_abelian by auto
  have part2: "∀n ∈ int.
      Homomor(les_d(n), les_G(n), les_opG(n), les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭))"
    using les_d_is_hom by auto
  have part3: "∀n ∈ int.
      (les_d(n))``(les_G(n)) ⊆
      (les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭))-``{TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))}"
  proof (rule ballI)
    fix n assume n: "n ∈ int"
    have nm1T: "n \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
      using n Int_ZF_1_L10(1) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) by simp
    have dn_fun: "les_d(n) : les_G(n) → les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
      using les_d_is_hom n unfolding Homomor_def by simp
    have dnm1_fun: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭) : les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭) → les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭)"
      using les_d_is_hom[OF nm1T] unfolding Homomor_def by simp
    show "(les_d(n))``(les_G(n)) ⊆
      (les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭))-``{TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))}"
    proof (rule subsetI)
      fix Y assume Ymem: "Y ∈ (les_d(n))``(les_G(n))"
      obtain X where XG: "X ∈ les_G(n)" and Yeq: "Y = les_d(n)`X"
        using func_imagedef[OF dn_fun subset_refl] Ymem by auto
      have YG: "Y ∈ les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭)"
        using apply_type[OF dn_fun XG] Yeq by simp
      have ddX: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭)`(les_d(n)`X) =
          TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))"
      proof -
        have "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬 ∨ n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭 ∨ n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
          using zmod_three_cases n by auto
        then show ?thesis
        proof (elim disjE)
          assume hn: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
          show ?thesis using les_dd_zero_mod0 n hn XG by auto
        next
          assume hn: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
          show ?thesis using les_dd_zero_mod1 n hn XG by auto
        next
          assume hn: "n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
          show ?thesis using les_dd_zero_mod2 n hn XG by auto
        qed
      qed
      have ddY: "les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭)`Y =
          TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))"
        using ddX Yeq by simp
      show "Y ∈ (les_d(n \<rs> 𝟭))-``{TheNeutralElement(les_G(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭), les_opG(n \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭))}"
        using func1_1_L15[OF dnm1_fun] YG ddY by auto
    qed
  qed
  from part1 part2 part3 show ?thesis unfolding IsAchainComplex_def by auto
qed

sublocale ses_chain_complex ⊆ les: chain_complex where C=les_G and P=les_opG and d=les_d
  unfolding chain_complex_def using les_is_chain_complex by auto

corollary (in ses_chain_complex) les_is_long_exact_sequence:
  shows "les.IsLongExactSequence"
  unfolding les.IsLongExactSequence_def
proof(safe)
  fix n assume n:"n:ℤ"
  have df: "les_d(n):les_G(n)→les_G(n\<rs>𝟭)"
    using les.cplx_hom[OF n] unfolding Homomor_def by auto
  {
    {
      assume nn:"n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
      then have as:"(n\<ra>𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬" using zmod_2_plus_one n by auto
      let ?k = "(n\<ra>𝟭) zdiv 𝟯"
      have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
      have nm1T: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 = n"
        using Int_ZF_1_2_L3(3) n int_zero_one_are_int(2) by auto
      have nm2T: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
        using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L10(1) int_zero_one_are_int(2) n by auto
      have nm1_mod: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
        using nm1T nn by auto
      have nm2_mod: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
        using zmod_2_minus_one n nm1T nm1_mod by auto
      have arith1: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n\<ra>𝟭"
        using nm1T by simp
      have arith2: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n\<ra>𝟭"
      proof -
        have s1: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = (n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭"
          using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3), of _ 𝟭] n by simp
        have s2: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = (n\<ra>𝟭)"
          using nm1T by simp
        have s3: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = (n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
          using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm2T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
        from s1 s2 s3 show ?thesis by simp
      qed
      have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
        using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
      have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
      have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
        using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
      have G_n: "les_G((n\<ra>𝟭)) = ab.src.Hn(?k)"
        unfolding les_G_def using as by simp
      have d_n: "les_d((n\<ra>𝟭)) = ab.Hn_map(?k)"
        unfolding les_d_def using as by simp
      have d_nm1: "les_d((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.Hn_map((((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)"
        unfolding les_d_def using nm1_mod two_neq_zero by simp
      have d_nm1_k: "les_d((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.Hn_map(?k)"
        using d_nm1 arith1 by simp
      have G_nm2: "les_G((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
        unfolding les_G_def using nm2_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two arith2 by simp
      have opG_nm2: "les_opG((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.HnOp(?k)"
        unfolding les_opG_def using nm2_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two arith2 by simp
      from G_n d_n d_nm1_k G_nm2 opG_nm2 have "IsExactAt(les_d(n\<ra>𝟭), les_G(n\<ra>𝟭), les_d((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭), 
        les_G((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭), les_opG((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭))"
        using long_exact_sequence[OF kT] by auto
      then have "les.Boundaries(n) = les.Cycles(n)"
        unfolding IsExactAt_def using nm1T by auto
    } moreover
    {
      assume A:"n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
      have "(n\<ra>𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = ((n zmod 𝟯)\<ra>𝟭)zmod 𝟯"
        using zmod_add_left[OF n Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] int_two_three_are_int(2) by auto
      with A have B:"(n\<ra>𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮 zmod 𝟯" by auto
      have T: "𝟬∈ℤ" "𝟭∈ℤ" "𝟮∈ℤ" "𝟯∈ℤ"
        using int_zero_one_are_int int_two_three_are_int by auto
      have lt23: "𝟮 $< 𝟯"
      proof -
        have "𝟮 \<lsq> 𝟯" using T(3) Int_ZF_2_L12B by simp
        moreover have "𝟮 ≠ 𝟯" using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF T(3)] by auto
        ultimately show ?thesis using Int_ZF_2_L9 by auto
      qed
      have le02: "𝟬 \<lsq> 𝟮"
      proof -
        have "𝟬 \<lsq> 𝟭" using T Int_ZF_2_L12B[of 𝟬] Int_ZF_1_1_L4 by simp
        moreover have "𝟭 \<lsq> 𝟮" using Int_ZF_2_L16B by simp
        ultimately show ?thesis using Int_order_transitive by auto
      qed
      have h1: "#0 $≤ 𝟮" using le02 Int_ZF_2_L1A Int_ZF_1_L8 by auto
      have two_mod: "𝟮 zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮"
      using zmod_pos_pos_trivial[OF h1 lt23] T(3) intify_ident by auto
      with B have nn:"(n\<ra>𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟮" by auto
      have C:"n\<ra>𝟭\<ra>𝟭 = n\<ra>𝟮" using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)
        n int_zero_one_are_int(2) by auto
      let ?k = "(n\<ra>𝟮) zdiv 𝟯"
      have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type by simp
      have nm1T: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 = n"
        using Int_ZF_1_2_L3(3) n int_zero_one_are_int(2) by auto
      have nm2T: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 ∈ ints"
        using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L10(1) int_zero_one_are_int(2) n by auto
      have nm1_mod: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭"
        using nm1T A by auto
      have nm2_mod: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
        using zmod_1_minus_one n nm1T nm1_mod by auto
      have arith1: "((n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟭 = n\<ra>𝟭"
        using nm1T by simp
      have arith2: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = n\<ra>𝟭"
      proof -
        have s1: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = (n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭"
          using nm1T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) group0.inv_cancel_two(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_T2(3), of _ 𝟭] n by simp
        have s2: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 = (n\<ra>𝟭)"
          using nm1T by simp
        have s3: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮 = (n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟭"
          using Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1)[OF nm2T Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_L8A(2), symmetric] by simp
        from s1 s2 s3 show ?thesis by simp
      qed
      have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
        using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
      have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
      have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
        using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
      have G_n: "les_G(n \<ra> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k)"
        unfolding les_G_def using two_neq_zero C nn by simp
      have d_n: "les_d(n \<ra> 𝟭) = bc.Hn_map(?k)"
        unfolding les_d_def using two_neq_zero C nn by simp
      have d_nm1: "les_d((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) = delta(((n \<ra>𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"
        unfolding les_d_def using nm1_mod one_neq_zero one_neq_two by simp
      have d_nm1_k: "les_d((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) = delta(?k)"
        using d_nm1 nm1T by simp
      have  "les_G((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.Hn((n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)"
        unfolding les_G_def using nm2_mod nn nm1T by simp
      then have G_nm2:"les_G((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.Hn(?k\<rs>𝟭)" using zdiv_minus_one[OF n] by auto
      have  "les_opG((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.HnOp((n \<rs> 𝟭) zdiv 𝟯)"
        unfolding les_opG_def using nm2_mod nm1T by simp
      then have opG_nm2:"les_opG((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.src.HnOp(?k\<rs>𝟭)" using zdiv_minus_one[OF n] by auto
      from G_n d_n d_nm1_k G_nm2 opG_nm2 have "IsExactAt(les_d(n\<ra>𝟭), les_G(n\<ra>𝟭), les_d((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭), 
        les_G((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭), les_opG((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭))"
        using long_exact_sequence[OF kT] by auto
      then have "les.Boundaries(n) = les.Cycles(n)"
        unfolding IsExactAt_def using nm1T by auto
    } moreover
    {
      assume as:"n zmod 𝟯 = 𝟬"
      let ?k="(n zdiv 𝟯)\<ra>𝟭"
      have kT: "?k ∈ ints" using zdiv_type Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) Int_ZF_1_1_L5(1) by simp
      have C:"(n\<ra>𝟭) zmod 𝟯 = 𝟭" using zmod_0_plus_one n as by auto
      have eq:"(n \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯 = ?k" 
        using Int_ZF_1_L8A(2) n int_two_three_are_int(1) Int_ZF_1_1_L7(1) Int_ZF_1_1_L5(4)
          zdiv_add_three by auto
      have nm1T: "(n\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 = n"
        using Int_ZF_1_2_L3(3) n int_zero_one_are_int(2) by auto
      have ndivT: "((n zdiv 𝟯)\<ra>𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 = n zdiv 𝟯"
        using Int_ZF_1_2_L3(3) n int_zero_one_are_int(2) by auto
      have two_neq_zero: "𝟮 ≠ 𝟬"
        using int_one_two_are_pos(2) Int_ZF_1_5_L3 Int_ZF_2_L16C(2) by auto
      have one_neq_zero: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟬" using int_zero_not_one by auto
      have one_neq_two: "𝟭 ≠ 𝟮"
        using Int_ZF_1_L14(1)[OF Int_ZF_1_L8A(2)] by auto
      have "les_G(n \<ra> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.Hn((n \<ra> 𝟭 \<ra> 𝟮) zdiv 𝟯)"
        unfolding les_G_def using one_neq_zero one_neq_two C by simp
      then have G_n:"les_G(n \<ra> 𝟭) = bc.tgt.Hn(?k)"
        using eq n by auto
      have d_n: "les_d(n \<ra> 𝟭) = delta(?k)"
        unfolding les_d_def using eq one_neq_zero one_neq_two C by simp
      have d_nm1_k: "les_d((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.Hn_map(?k\<rs>𝟭)"
        unfolding les_d_def using as nm1T ndivT by simp
      have G_nm2:"les_G((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.Hn(?k\<rs>𝟭)"
        unfolding les_G_def using nm1T zmod_0_minus_one[OF n as] two_neq_zero
        Int_ZF_1_2_L3(4)[OF n int_zero_one_are_int(2)] ndivT by simp
      have  opG_nm2:"les_opG((n \<ra> 𝟭) \<rs> 𝟭 \<rs> 𝟭) = ab.tgt.HnOp(?k\<rs>𝟭)"
        unfolding les_opG_def using nm1T zmod_0_minus_one[OF n as] two_neq_zero
        Int_ZF_1_2_L3(4)[OF n int_zero_one_are_int(2)] ndivT by simp
      from G_n d_n d_nm1_k G_nm2 opG_nm2 have "IsExactAt(les_d(n\<ra>𝟭), les_G(n\<ra>𝟭), les_d((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭), 
        les_G((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭), les_opG((n\<ra>𝟭)\<rs>𝟭\<rs>𝟭))"
        using long_exact_sequence[OF kT] by auto
      then have "les.Boundaries(n) = les.Cycles(n)"
        unfolding IsExactAt_def using nm1T by auto
    }
    ultimately have "les.Boundaries(n) = les.Cycles(n)" using zmod_three_cases[OF n] by auto
  }
  then show "les.Boundaries(n) = les.Cycles(n)" by auto
qed

subsection ‹The snake lemma›

text‹A \emph{morphism of short exact sequences} is a commutative diagram
  \[
    0 \to A \xrightarrow{f} B \xrightarrow{g} C \to 0
  \]
  on top and
  \[
    0 \to A' \xrightarrow{f'} B' \xrightarrow{g'} C' \to 0
  \]
  on the bottom, connected by vertical group homomorphisms
  $\alpha \colon A \to A'$, $\beta \colon B \to B'$, $\gamma \colon C \to C'$
  such that $f' \circ \alpha = \beta \circ f$ and $g' \circ \beta = \gamma \circ g$.›

locale ses_morphism =
  fixes A  :: i and PA :: i and f  :: i
    and B  :: i and PB :: i and g  :: i
    and C  :: i and PC :: i
    and A' :: i and PA':: i and f' :: i
    and B' :: i and PB':: i and g' :: i
    and C' :: i and PC':: i
    and α  :: i and β  :: i and γ  :: i
  assumes row1:        "IsAshortExactSequence(A, PA, B, PB, C, PC, f, g)"
    and   row2:        "IsAshortExactSequence(A', PA', B', PB', C', PC', f', g')"
    and   hom_α:       "Homomor(α, A, PA, A', PA')"
    and   hom_β:       "Homomor(β, B, PB, B', PB')"
    and   hom_γ:       "Homomor(γ, C, PC, C', PC')"
    and   comm_left:   "f' O α = β O f"
    and   comm_right:  "g' O β = γ O g"
    and   comm_A':    "PA' {is commutative on} A'"
    and   comm_B':    "PB' {is commutative on} B'"
    and   comm_C':    "PC' {is commutative on} C'"

text‹Kernel of each vertical map.›

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) ker_α :: i where
  "ker_α ≡ α-``{TheNeutralElement(A', PA')}"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) ker_β :: i where
  "ker_β ≡ β-``{TheNeutralElement(B', PB')}"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) ker_γ :: i where
  "ker_γ ≡ γ-``{TheNeutralElement(C', PC')}"

text‹Cokernel carrier and operation for each vertical map.›

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) coker_α :: i where
  "coker_α ≡ A' // QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) cokerOp_α :: i where
  "cokerOp_α ≡ QuotientGroupOp(A', PA', α``A)"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) coker_β :: i where
  "coker_β ≡ B' // QuotientGroupRel(B', PB', β``B)"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) cokerOp_β :: i where
  "cokerOp_β ≡ QuotientGroupOp(B', PB', β``B)"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) coker_γ :: i where
  "coker_γ ≡ C' // QuotientGroupRel(C', PC', γ``C)"

abbreviation (in ses_morphism) cokerOp_γ :: i where
  "cokerOp_γ ≡ QuotientGroupOp(C', PC', γ``C)"

text‹Basic structural lemmas: group types extracted from the SES rows.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpA:  "IsAgroup(A, PA)"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpB:  "IsAgroup(B, PB)"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpC:  "IsAgroup(C, PC)"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpA': "IsAgroup(A', PA')"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpB': "IsAgroup(B', PB')"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) grpC': "IsAgroup(C', PC')"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto

text‹The maps as typed functions.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) f_fun:  "f  : A  → B"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) g_fun:  "g  : B  → C"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) f'_fun: "f' : A' → B'"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) g'_fun: "g' : B' → C'"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) α_fun: "α : A  → A'"
  using hom_α unfolding Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) β_fun: "β : B  → B'"
  using hom_β unfolding Homomor_def by auto

lemma (in ses_morphism) γ_fun: "γ : C  → C'"
  using hom_γ unfolding Homomor_def by auto

text‹Image of $f$ equals kernel of $g$ (exactness at $B$).›

lemma (in ses_morphism) row1_im_eq_ker:
  "f``A = g-``{TheNeutralElement(C, PC)}"
  using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def IsExactAt_def by auto

text‹Image of $f'$ equals kernel of $g'$ (exactness at $B'$).›

lemma (in ses_morphism) row2_im_eq_ker:
  "f'``A' = g'-``{TheNeutralElement(C', PC')}"
  using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def IsExactAt_def by auto

text‹$f$ is injective.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) f_inj: "f ∈ inj(A, B)"
proof -
  have ea: "IsExactAt(ZeroMap(1, A, PA), 1, f, B, PB)"
    using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def by auto
  from ea have "f-``{TheNeutralElement(B, PB)} = {TheNeutralElement(A, PA)}"
    using ZeroMap_image[OF trivial_group grpA] unfolding IsExactAt_def by auto
  with group_homo.kernel_trivial_iff_injective[of A PA B PB f]
       row1 
  show ?thesis unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto
qed

text‹$f'$ is injective.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) f'_inj: "f' ∈ inj(A', B')"
proof -
  have ea: "IsExactAt(ZeroMap(1, A', PA'), 1, f', B', PB')"
    using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def by auto
  from ea have "f'-``{TheNeutralElement(B', PB')} = {TheNeutralElement(A', PA')}"
    using ZeroMap_image[OF trivial_group grpA'] unfolding IsExactAt_def by auto
  with group_homo.kernel_trivial_iff_injective[of A' PA' B' PB' f']
       row2
  show ?thesis unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def group_homo_def by auto
qed

text‹$g$ is surjective.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) g_surj: "g``B = C"
proof -
  have ea: "IsExactAt(g, B, ZeroMap(C, 1, TrivOp), 1, TrivOp)"
    using row1 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def by auto
  from ea have "g``B = ZeroMap(C, 1, TrivOp)-``{TheNeutralElement(1, TrivOp)}"
    unfolding IsExactAt_def by simp
  also have "… = C"
    using ZeroMap_preimage_full[OF grpC trivial_group] TrivOp_ne by simp
  finally show ?thesis .
qed

text‹$g'$ is surjective.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) g'_surj: "g'``B' = C'"
proof -
  have ea: "IsExactAt(g', B', ZeroMap(C', 1, TrivOp), 1, TrivOp)"
    using row2 unfolding IsAshortExactSequence_def by auto
  from ea have "g'``B' = ZeroMap(C', 1, TrivOp)-``{TheNeutralElement(1, TrivOp)}"
    unfolding IsExactAt_def by simp
  also have "… = C'"
    using ZeroMap_preimage_full[OF grpC' trivial_group] TrivOp_ne by simp
  finally show ?thesis .
qed

text‹Given $b \in B$ such that $\beta(b) \in \mathrm{im}(f')$, the unique preimage
  of $\beta(b)$ under $f'$ in $A'$.›

definition (in ses_morphism) snake_a_of_b :: "i ⇒ i" where
  "snake_a_of_b(b) ≡ THE a'. a' ∈ A' ∧ f'`a' = β`b"

text‹The snake connecting map.  For $c \in \ker(\gamma)$, we lift $c$ to some
  $b \in B$ with $g(b)=c$; then $\beta(b) \in \ker(g')$ by commutativity, so
  $\beta(b) = f'(a')$ for a unique $a' \in A'$, and $\delta(c) = [a']$ in
  $\mathrm{coker}(\alpha)$.  We define it as a replacement indexed by
  $(c, b)$-pairs with $g(b) = c$; we prove below that the cokernel class is
  independent of the choice of lift $b$, so this is a well-defined function.›

definition (in ses_morphism) snake_delta :: "i" where
  "snake_delta ≡
    {⟨fst(p), QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)``{snake_a_of_b(snd(p))}⟩.
     p ∈ {p ∈ ker_γ × B. g`(snd(p)) = fst(p)}}"

subsection ‹The snake connecting homomorphism›

text‹The image of $\alpha$ is a normal subgroup of $(A', PA')$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) alpha_img_normal:
  shows "IsAnormalSubgroup(A', PA', α``A)"
proof -
  interpret alph: group_homo A PA A' PA' α
    "TheNeutralElement(A, PA)" "λx y. PA`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(A,PA)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PA,TheNeutralElement(A,PA),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PA,TheNeutralElement(A,PA),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(A',PA')" "λx y. PA'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(A',PA')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpA grpA' hom_α unfolding group_homo_def by simp
  from Group_ZF_2_4_L6(1)[OF grpA' comm_A' alph.image_is_group]
  show ?thesis by simp
qed

text‹The kernel of $\gamma$ is a subgroup of $(C, PC)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) ker_gamma_subgroup:
  shows "IsAsubgroup(ker_γ, PC)"
proof -
  interpret gam: group_homo C PC C' PC' γ
    "TheNeutralElement(C,PC)" "λx y. PC`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(C,PC)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(C',PC')" "λx y. PC'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(C',PC')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PC',TheNeutralElement(C',PC'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PC',TheNeutralElement(C',PC'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpC grpC' hom_γ unfolding group_homo_def by simp
  from gam.kernel_is_subgroup show ?thesis by assumption
qed

text‹For $b \in B$ with $g(b) \in \ker(\gamma)$, $\beta(b)$ lies in $\mathrm{im}(f')$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) beta_b_in_im_f':
  assumes bB: "b ∈ B" and gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ"
  shows "β`b ∈ f'``A'"
proof -
  have βb_B': "β`b ∈ B'" using β_fun bB apply_type by simp
  have gb_C: "g`b ∈ C" using g_fun bB apply_type by simp
  have g'_βb: "g'`(β`b) = γ`(g`b)"
  proof -
    have l: "(g' O β)`b = g'`(β`b)"
      using comp_fun_apply β_fun g'_fun bB by simp
    have r: "(γ O g)`b = γ`(g`b)"
      using comp_fun_apply g_fun γ_fun bB by simp
    from comm_right l r show ?thesis by simp
  qed
  have "γ`(g`b) = TheNeutralElement(C', PC')"
    using func1_1_L15[OF γ_fun] gb_ker gb_C by auto
  with g'_βb have "g'`(β`b) = TheNeutralElement(C', PC')" by simp
  then have "β`b ∈ g'-``{TheNeutralElement(C', PC')}"
    using func1_1_L15[OF g'_fun] βb_B' by simp
  with row2_im_eq_ker show ?thesis by simp
qed

text‹The preimage $a'$ of $\beta(b)$ under $f'$ exists uniquely when $g(b) \in \ker(\gamma)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) snake_a_of_b_exists_unique:
  assumes bB: "b ∈ B" and gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ"
  shows "∃!a'. a' ∈ A' ∧ f'`a' = β`b"
proof -
  from beta_b_in_im_f'[OF bB gb_ker] obtain a'
    where a'A': "a' ∈ A'" and f'a': "f'`a' = β`b"
    using func_imagedef[OF f'_fun] by auto
  show "∃!a'. a' ∈ A' ∧ f'`a' = β`b"
  proof (rule ex1I)
    show "a' ∈ A' ∧ f'`a' = β`b" using a'A' f'a' by simp
  next
    fix a'' assume H: "a'' ∈ A' ∧ f'`a'' = β`b"
    then have "f'`a'' = f'`a'" using f'a' by simp
    with H a'A' show "a'' = a'" using f'_inj unfolding inj_def by auto
  qed
qed

text‹$\mathrm{snake\_a\_of\_b}(b) \in A'$ when $g(b) \in \ker(\gamma)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) snake_a_of_b_in_A':
  assumes bB: "b ∈ B" and gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ"
  shows "snake_a_of_b(b) ∈ A'"
  unfolding snake_a_of_b_def
  using theI2[OF snake_a_of_b_exists_unique[OF bB gb_ker],
              of "λa'. a' ∈ A'"] by blast

text‹$f'(\mathrm{snake\_a\_of\_b}(b)) = \beta(b)$ when $g(b) \in \ker(\gamma)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) snake_a_of_b_maps:
  assumes bB: "b ∈ B" and gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ"
  shows "f'`(snake_a_of_b(b)) = β`b"
  unfolding snake_a_of_b_def
  using theI2[OF snake_a_of_b_exists_unique[OF bB gb_ker],
              of "λa'. f'`a' = β`b"] by blast

text‹The cokernel class of $\mathrm{snake\_a\_of\_b}$ is independent of the choice of lift $b$:
  if $g(b_1) = g(b_2)$ and both lie in $\ker(\gamma)$, then
  $[\mathrm{snake\_a\_of\_b}(b_1)] = [\mathrm{snake\_a\_of\_b}(b_2)]$ in $\mathrm{coker}(\alpha)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) snake_class_independent:
  assumes b1B: "b⇩1 ∈ B" and b2B: "b⇩2 ∈ B"
    and gb_eq: "g`b⇩1 = g`b⇩2" and gb_ker: "g`b⇩1 ∈ ker_γ"
  shows "QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)``{snake_a_of_b(b⇩1)} =
         QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)``{snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)}"
proof -
  let ?R = "QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)"
  have gb2_ker: "g`b⇩2 ∈ ker_γ" using gb_eq gb_ker by simp
  interpret βhom: group_homo B PB B' PB' β
    "TheNeutralElement(B,PB)" "λx y. PB`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(B,PB)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(B',PB')" "λx y. PB'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(B',PB')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpB grpB' hom_β unfolding group_homo_def by simp
  interpret f'hom: group_homo A' PA' B' PB' f'
    "TheNeutralElement(A',PA')" "λx y. PA'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(A',PA')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(B',PB')" "λx y. PB'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(B',PB')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpA' grpB' row2 unfolding group_homo_def IsAshortExactSequence_def by simp
  interpret ghom: group_homo B PB C PC g
    "TheNeutralElement(B,PB)" "λx y. PB`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(B,PB)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(C,PC)" "λx y. PC`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(C,PC)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpB grpC row1 unfolding group_homo_def IsAshortExactSequence_def by simp
  let ?a⇩1 = "snake_a_of_b(b⇩1)"
  let ?a⇩2 = "snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)"
  have a1_A': "?a⇩1 ∈ A'" using snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF b1B gb_ker] by simp
  have a2_A': "?a⇩2 ∈ A'" using snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF b2B gb2_ker] by simp
  have f'a1: "f'`?a⇩1 = β`b⇩1" using snake_a_of_b_maps[OF b1B gb_ker] by simp
  have f'a2: "f'`?a⇩2 = β`b⇩2" using snake_a_of_b_maps[OF b2B gb2_ker] by simp
  let ?diff_b = "PB`⟨b⇩1, GroupInv(B,PB)`b⇩2⟩"
  have b2_inv_B: "GroupInv(B,PB)`b⇩2 ∈ B" using b2B ghom.origin
      group0.inverse_in_group[of B PB] unfolding group0_def by (simp only:)
  have diff_b_B: "?diff_b ∈ B"
    using b1B b2_inv_B ghom.origin group0.group_op_closed[of B PB] unfolding group0_def by (simp only:) 
  have g_diff_zero: "g`?diff_b = TheNeutralElement(C, PC)"
  proof -
    have "g`?diff_b = PC`⟨g`b⇩1, g`(GroupInv(B,PB)`b⇩2)⟩"
      using ghom.f_hom[OF b1B b2_inv_B] by (simp only:)
    also have "… = PC`⟨g`b⇩1, GroupInv(C,PC)`(g`b⇩2)⟩"
      using ghom.f_inv[OF b2B] by (simp only:)
    also have "… = PC`⟨g`b⇩1, GroupInv(C,PC)`(g`b⇩1)⟩"
      using gb_eq by (simp only:)
    also have "… = TheNeutralElement(C,PC)"
      using ghom.tgt.group0_2_L6[OF apply_type[OF g_fun b1B]] by (simp only:)
    finally show ?thesis .
  qed
  then have diff_b_ker_g: "?diff_b ∈ f``A"
    using func1_1_L15[OF g_fun, of "{TheNeutralElement(C,PC)}"] 
      diff_b_B row1_im_eq_ker by (auto simp only:)
  have im:"f `` A = {f ` x . x ∈ A}" using func_imagedef[OF f_fun] by auto
  then have "?diff_b∈{f ` x . x ∈ A}" using diff_b_ker_g by (auto simp only:)
  then obtain aa where aaA: "aa ∈ A" and f_aa: "?diff_b = f`aa"
    by blast 
  have αaa_A': "α`aa ∈ A'" using α_fun aaA apply_type by (auto simp only:)
  interpret αhom: group_homo A PA A' PA' α
    "TheNeutralElement(A,PA)" "λx y. PA`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(A,PA)`x"
    "λs. Fold(PA,TheNeutralElement(A,PA),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PA,TheNeutralElement(A,PA),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    "TheNeutralElement(A',PA')" "λx y. PA'`⟨x,y⟩"
    "λx. GroupInv(A',PA')`x"
    "λs. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),s)"
    "λm x. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
    using grpA grpA' hom_α unfolding group_homo_def by simp
  have β_diff_b: "β`?diff_b = PB'`⟨β`b⇩1, GroupInv(B',PB')`(β`b⇩2)⟩"
  proof -
    have "β`?diff_b = PB'`⟨β`b⇩1, β`(GroupInv(B,PB)`b⇩2)⟩"
      using βhom.f_hom[OF b1B b2_inv_B] by (auto simp only:)
    also have "… = PB'`⟨β`b⇩1, GroupInv(B',PB')`(β`b⇩2)⟩"
      using βhom.f_inv[OF b2B] by (auto simp only:)
    finally show ?thesis .
  qed
  have f'_αaa: "f'`(α`aa) = β`?diff_b"
  proof -
    have "(f' O α)`aa = (β O f)`aa" using comm_left by simp
    then have "f'`(α`aa) = β`(f`aa)"
      using comp_fun_apply α_fun f'_fun aaA comp_fun_apply f_fun β_fun aaA by simp
    with f_aa show ?thesis by (auto simp only:)
  qed
  have diff_a1_a2: "PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩ = α`aa"
  proof -
    have a2_inv_A': "GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2 ∈ A'"
      using a2_A' f'hom.org.inverse_in_group by (auto simp only:)
    have f'_sum: "f'`(PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩) =
                  PB'`⟨f'`?a⇩1, GroupInv(B',PB')`(f'`?a⇩2)⟩"
    proof -
      have "f'`(PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩) =
            PB'`⟨f'`?a⇩1, f'`(GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2)⟩"
        using f'hom.f_hom[OF a1_A' a2_inv_A'] by (auto simp only:)
      also have "… = PB'`⟨f'`?a⇩1, GroupInv(B',PB')`(f'`?a⇩2)⟩"
        using f'hom.f_inv[OF a2_A'] by (auto simp only:)
      finally show ?thesis .
    qed
    have "PB'`⟨f'`?a⇩1, GroupInv(B',PB')`(f'`?a⇩2)⟩ = β`?diff_b"
      using f'a1 f'a2 β_diff_b by (auto simp only:)
    with f'_sum have "f'`(PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩) = f'`(α`aa)"
      using f'_αaa by (auto simp only:)
    moreover have "PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩ ∈ A'"
      using a1_A' a2_inv_A' f'hom.org.group_op_closed by (auto simp only:)
    ultimately show ?thesis using f'_inj αaa_A' unfolding inj_def by (auto simp only:)
  qed
  have pair_in_R: "⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩ ∈ ?R"
  proof -
    have A:"⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩ ∈ A' × A'" using a1_A' a2_A' by simp
    from diff_a1_a2 have "PA'`⟨?a⇩1, GroupInv(A',PA')`?a⇩2⟩ = α`aa" by (auto simp only:)
    then have E:"PA'`⟨snake_a_of_b(b⇩1), GroupInv(A',PA')`snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)⟩ ∈ {α`x. x∈A}"
      using aaA by (auto simp only:)
    have "α``A = {α`x. x∈A}" using func_imagedef[OF α_fun, of A] by auto
    with E have "PA'`⟨snake_a_of_b(b⇩1), GroupInv(A',PA')`snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)⟩ ∈ α``A"
      by (auto simp only:)
    with A show ?thesis unfolding QuotientGroupRel_def by (auto simp only: split)
  qed
  have equiv_R: "equiv(A', ?R)"
    using alpha_img_normal grpA'
    using group0.Group_ZF_2_4_L3
    unfolding group0_def IsAnormalSubgroup_def by blast
  from equiv_class_eq[OF equiv_R pair_in_R] a1_A'
  show ?thesis by simp
qed

text‹$\mathrm{snake\_delta}$ is a function from $\ker(\gamma)$ to $\mathrm{coker}(\alpha)$.›

lemma (in ses_morphism) snake_delta_is_fun:
  shows "snake_delta : ker_γ → coker_α"
proof -
  let ?R = "QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)"
  have ker_sub_C: "ker_γ ⊆ C"
    using ker_gamma_subgroup grpC group0.group0_3_L2
    unfolding group0_def IsAsubgroup_def by auto
  have norm: "IsAnormalSubgroup(A', PA', α``A)" using alpha_img_normal by simp
  have equiv_R: "equiv(A', ?R)"
    using norm grpA' group0.Group_ZF_2_4_L3
    unfolding group0_def IsAnormalSubgroup_def by auto
  have sub_pow: "snake_delta ∈ Pow(ker_γ × coker_α)"
  proof (safe)
    fix p assume "p ∈ snake_delta"
    then obtain c b where cC: "c ∈ ker_γ" and bB: "b ∈ B"
      and gbC: "g`b = c" and p_eq: "p = ⟨c, ?R``{snake_a_of_b(b)}⟩"
      unfolding snake_delta_def by auto
    from cC gbC have gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ" by simp
    from snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF bB gb_ker] equiv_R
    have "?R``{snake_a_of_b(b)} ∈ coker_α"
      unfolding quotient_def by auto
    with p_eq cC show "p ∈ ker_γ × coker_α" by auto
  qed
  have dom_sub: "ker_γ ⊆ domain(snake_delta)"
  proof
    fix c assume cC: "c ∈ ker_γ"
    then have cC': "c ∈ C" using ker_sub_C by auto
    from cC' g_surj obtain b where bB: "b ∈ B" and gbc: "g`b = c"
      using func_imagedef[OF g_fun] by auto
    from cC gbc have gb_ker: "g`b ∈ ker_γ" by simp
    from snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF bB gb_ker]
    have "⟨c, ?R``{snake_a_of_b(b)}⟩ ∈ snake_delta"
      unfolding snake_delta_def using cC bB gbc by auto
    then show "c ∈ domain(snake_delta)" unfolding domain_def by auto
  qed
  have sv: "∀A y t. ⟨A,y⟩ ∈ snake_delta ⟶ ⟨A,t⟩ ∈ snake_delta ⟶ y = t"
  proof (intro allI impI)
    fix c y t
    assume Ay: "⟨c,y⟩ ∈ snake_delta" and At: "⟨c,t⟩ ∈ snake_delta"
    from Ay obtain b⇩1 where b1B: "b⇩1 ∈ B" and gb1: "g`b⇩1 = c"
      and cK1: "c ∈ ker_γ"
      and y_eq: "y = ?R``{snake_a_of_b(b⇩1)}"
      unfolding snake_delta_def by auto
    from At obtain b⇩2 where b2B: "b⇩2 ∈ B" and gb2: "g`b⇩2 = c"
      and t_eq: "t = ?R``{snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)}"
      unfolding snake_delta_def by auto
    from gb1 gb2 have gb_eq: "g`b⇩1 = g`b⇩2" by simp
    from gb1 cK1 have gb1_ker: "g`b⇩1 ∈ ker_γ" by simp
    from snake_class_independent[OF b1B b2B gb_eq gb1_ker]
    show "y = t" using y_eq t_eq by simp
  qed
  from sub_pow dom_sub sv show ?thesis unfolding Pi_def function_def by auto
qed

text‹The snake connecting map is a group homomorphism from $\ker(\gamma)$ to $\mathrm{coker}(\alpha)$.›

theorem (in ses_morphism) snake_delta_is_hom:
  shows "Homomor(snake_delta, ker_γ, restrict(PC, ker_γ × ker_γ), coker_α, cokerOp_α)"
proof -
  let ?R = "QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α``A)"
  have norm: "IsAnormalSubgroup(A', PA', α``A)" using alpha_img_normal by simp
  have equiv_R: "equiv(A', ?R)"
    using norm grpA' group0.Group_ZF_2_4_L3
    unfolding group0_def IsAnormalSubgroup_def by auto
  have cong_R: "Congruent2(?R, PA')"
    using Group_ZF_2_4_L5A[OF grpA' norm] by simp
  have ker_sub_C: "ker_γ ⊆ C"
    using ker_gamma_subgroup grpC group0.group0_3_L2
    unfolding group0_def IsAsubgroup_def by auto
  have delta_fun: "snake_delta : ker_γ → coker_α"
    using snake_delta_is_fun by simp
  have morphism: "IsMorphism(ker_γ, restrict(PC, ker_γ × ker_γ), cokerOp_α, snake_delta)"
    unfolding IsMorphism_def
  proof (intro ballI)
    fix c⇩1 c⇩2 assume c1K: "c⇩1 ∈ ker_γ" and c2K: "c⇩2 ∈ ker_γ"
    show "snake_delta`(restrict(PC, ker_γ × ker_γ)`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩) =
          cokerOp_α`⟨snake_delta`c⇩1, snake_delta`c⇩2⟩"
    proof -
      have c1C: "c⇩1 ∈ C" using c1K ker_sub_C by auto
      have c2C: "c⇩2 ∈ C" using c2K ker_sub_C by auto
      have sum_ker: "PC`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩ ∈ ker_γ"
        using ker_gamma_subgroup c1K c2K
        using group0.group_op_closed[of ker_γ "restrict(PC,ker_γ×ker_γ)"] restrict[of PC "ker_γ×ker_γ"]
        unfolding group0_def IsAsubgroup_def by auto
      have res_eq: "restrict(PC, ker_γ × ker_γ)`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩ = PC`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩"
        using restrict c1K c2K by simp
      from c1C g_surj obtain b⇩1 where b1B: "b⇩1 ∈ B" and gb1: "g`b⇩1 = c⇩1"
        using func_imagedef[OF g_fun] by auto
      from c2C g_surj obtain b⇩2 where b2B: "b⇩2 ∈ B" and gb2: "g`b⇩2 = c⇩2"
        using func_imagedef[OF g_fun] by auto
      from gb1 c1K have gb1_ker: "g`b⇩1 ∈ ker_γ" by simp
      from gb2 c2K have gb2_ker: "g`b⇩2 ∈ ker_γ" by simp
      let ?a⇩1 = "snake_a_of_b(b⇩1)"
      let ?a⇩2 = "snake_a_of_b(b⇩2)"
      have a1_A': "?a⇩1 ∈ A'" using snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF b1B gb1_ker] by simp
      have a2_A': "?a⇩2 ∈ A'" using snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF b2B gb2_ker] by simp
      have f'a1: "f'`?a⇩1 = β`b⇩1" using snake_a_of_b_maps[OF b1B gb1_ker] by simp
      have f'a2: "f'`?a⇩2 = β`b⇩2" using snake_a_of_b_maps[OF b2B gb2_ker] by simp
      interpret ghom: group_homo B PB C PC g
        "TheNeutralElement(B,PB)" "λx y. PB`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(B,PB)`x"
        "λs. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        "TheNeutralElement(C,PC)" "λx y. PC`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(C,PC)`x"
        "λs. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PC,TheNeutralElement(C,PC),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        using grpB grpC row1 unfolding group_homo_def IsAshortExactSequence_def by simp
      interpret βhom: group_homo B PB B' PB' β
        "TheNeutralElement(B,PB)" "λx y. PB`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(B,PB)`x"
        "λs. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PB,TheNeutralElement(B,PB),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        "TheNeutralElement(B',PB')" "λx y. PB'`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(B',PB')`x"
        "λs. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        using grpB grpB' hom_β unfolding group_homo_def by simp
      interpret f'hom: group_homo A' PA' B' PB' f'
        "TheNeutralElement(A',PA')" "λx y. PA'`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(A',PA')`x"
        "λs. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PA',TheNeutralElement(A',PA'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        "TheNeutralElement(B',PB')" "λx y. PB'`⟨x,y⟩"
        "λx. GroupInv(B',PB')`x"
        "λs. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),s)"
        "λm x. Fold(PB',TheNeutralElement(B',PB'),{⟨k,x⟩. k ∈ m})"
        using grpA' grpB' row2 unfolding group_homo_def IsAshortExactSequence_def by simp
      let ?b⇩12 = "PB`⟨b⇩1, b⇩2⟩"
      have b12B: "?b⇩12 ∈ B" using b1B b2B ghom.org.group_op_closed by (simp only:)
      have g_b12: "g`?b⇩12 = PC`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩"
        using ghom.f_hom[OF b1B b2B] gb1 gb2 by (simp only:)
      have gb12_ker: "g`?b⇩12 ∈ ker_γ" using g_b12 sum_ker by (simp only:)
      let ?a⇩12 = "snake_a_of_b(?b⇩12)"
      have a12_A': "?a⇩12 ∈ A'" using snake_a_of_b_in_A'[OF b12B gb12_ker] by (simp only:)
      have f'a12: "f'`?a⇩12 = β`?b⇩12" using snake_a_of_b_maps[OF b12B gb12_ker] by (simp only:)
      have beta_add: "β`?b⇩12 = PB'`⟨β`b⇩1, β`b⇩2⟩"
        using βhom.f_hom[OF b1B b2B] by (simp only:)
      have f'_a12_eq: "f'`?a⇩12 = f'`(PA'`⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩)"
      proof -
        have "f'`(PA'`⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩) = PB'`⟨f'`?a⇩1, f'`?a⇩2⟩"
          using f'hom.f_hom[OF a1_A' a2_A'] by (simp only:)
        also have "… = PB'`⟨β`b⇩1, β`b⇩2⟩"
          using f'a1 f'a2 by (simp only:)
        also have "… = β`?b⇩12"
          using beta_add by (simp only:)
        also have "… = f'`?a⇩12"
          using f'a12 by (simp only:)
        finally show ?thesis by (simp only:)
      qed
      have a_sum_A': "PA'`⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩ ∈ A'"
        using a1_A' a2_A' f'hom.org.group_op_closed by (simp only:)
      have a12_eq_sum: "?a⇩12 = PA'`⟨?a⇩1, ?a⇩2⟩"
        using f'_inj a12_A' a_sum_A' f'_a12_eq unfolding inj_def by (auto simp only:)
      have pair1: "⟨c⇩1, ?R``{?a⇩1}⟩ ∈ snake_delta"
        unfolding snake_delta_def using c1K b1B gb1 by auto
      have pair2: "⟨c⇩2, ?R``{?a⇩2}⟩ ∈ snake_delta"
        unfolding snake_delta_def using c2K b2B gb2 by auto
      have "⟨PC ` ⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩,PB ` ⟨b⇩1, b⇩2⟩⟩∈ {p ∈ ker_γ × B .
           g ` snd(p) = fst(p)}" using sum_ker b12B g_b12 by (auto simp only:fst_conv snd_conv)
      then have "⟨fst(⟨PC ` ⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩,PB ` ⟨b⇩1, b⇩2⟩⟩),
      QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α `` A) ``
      {snake_a_of_b(snd(⟨PC ` ⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩,PB ` ⟨b⇩1, b⇩2⟩⟩))}⟩ ∈ snake_delta"
        unfolding snake_delta_def by (auto simp only:)
      then have pair12:"⟨PC`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩, QuotientGroupRel(A', PA', α `` A) ``
      {snake_a_of_b(PB ` ⟨b⇩1, b⇩2⟩)}⟩ ∈ snake_delta" by (simp only:fst_conv snd_conv)
      from pair1 delta_fun have step1: "snake_delta`c⇩1 = ?R``{?a⇩1}"
        using apply_equality by simp
      from pair2 delta_fun have step2: "snake_delta`c⇩2 = ?R``{?a⇩2}"
        using apply_equality by simp
      from pair12 delta_fun have step12:
        "snake_delta`(PC`⟨c⇩1,c⇩2⟩) = ?R``{?a⇩12}"
        using apply_equality by (simp only:)
      have coker_op: "cokerOp_α`⟨?R``{?a⇩1}, ?R``{?a⇩2}⟩ = ?R``{PA'`⟨?a⇩1,?a⇩2⟩}"
        using EquivClass_1_L10[OF equiv_R cong_R a1_A' a2_A']
        unfolding QuotientGroupOp_def by (simp only:)
      from step12 a12_eq_sum coker_op step1 step2 res_eq
      show "snake_delta`(restrict(PC, ker_γ × ker_γ)`⟨c⇩1, c⇩2⟩) =
            cokerOp_α`⟨snake_delta`c⇩1, snake_delta`c⇩2⟩"
        by  (simp only:)
    qed
  qed
  from delta_fun morphism show ?thesis unfolding Homomor_def by simp
qed


end
